notes: Pop-culture pilot of the source-grounded pipeline. Clues written only from facts in Wikipedia lead extracts stored under data/sourcing/docs/pop_culture_media_modern_life/. Each citation points to the exact Wikipedia article from which the stated fact was drawn.
verification_status = unverified — run verify-clue-sources.mjs --pack <this file> --write-back in a network-enabled environment before import.
